prompt: Redesign this music player app's 'Now Playing' screen to look like a vintage 1970s record player, with a spinning vinyl disc and analog controls.
prompt_refined:
Generate an image transforming the entire 'Now Playing' screen from image 1 into a vintage 1970s record player interface. The main background should be a rich, dark wood grain, reminiscent of 70s audio consoles.

In the upper central area, replacing the album art from image 1, display a black vinyl record with the album art from image 1 serving as its detailed, spinning label.

Below the vinyl record, in the approximate location of the progress bar from image 1, create an analog progress display, such as a glowing bar or a needle moving across a vintage illuminated dial.

The current song information ('afterlife dating', 'Teen Suicide') from image 1 should be presented on a small, retro-style green LED display panel, placed within the main record player console.

In the lower half of the screen, transform all digital playback controls (play/pause, skip forward/backward, shuffle, repeat) from image 1 into distinct, chunky 1970s-era analog controls: prominent push-buttons, rotary knobs, and toggle switches, arranged on a brushed metallic control surface.

The top-left 'Liked Songs' heading from image 1 should be replaced by a retro-futuristic text display or an illuminated button labeled 'PLAYING' or 'SOURCE'. The phone's status bar elements (time 9:41, cellular/Wi-Fi signal, battery) from the top-right of image 1 should be re-stylized as a period-appropriate digital clock display and simple analog indicator lights or meters, seamlessly integrated into the top edge of the overall 70s record player design.
objects: Black vinyl record in the upper central area
Album art from image 1 as a spinning label on the vinyl record
Analog progress display below the vinyl record
Retro-style green LED display panel with current song information
Brushed metallic control surface in the lower half
Retro-futuristic text display or illuminated button labeled 'PLAYING' or 'SOURCE' in the top-left
Period-appropriate digital clock display and simple analog indicator lights/meters in the top-right
